description: Allowlisted safe remediation actions for the PFE anomaly detection pipeline.

no_action.description: Do nothing because the final decision is normal or no safe action is required.

collect_host_diagnostics.description: Collect local DevOps host diagnostics such as uptime, memory, disk, network interfaces and service status.

collect_network_diagnostics.description: Collect network-side diagnostic information without modifying routers, switches or services.

refresh_monitoring_snapshot.description: Re-export the latest Prometheus snapshot for dashboard/analyzer refresh.

run_validation_gate.description: Run the existing Ansible validation gate to confirm the current topology state.

restart_dmz_web.description: Restart only the DMZ Web/Nginx container on the GNS3 host.

restart_dmz_dns.description: Restart only the DMZ DNS container on the GNS3 host.

restart_dmz_services.description: Restart the DMZ Web and DNS containers on the GNS3 host.
